headline: Prediction: This Will Be Uber’s Stock Price by The End of 2026
summary: Uber (NYSE:UBER) just delivered a quarter that crystallizes the bull thesis. The company reported Gross Bookings of $53.72 billion, up 25% YoY, and guided Q2 well above consensus. The stock jumped 8.53% on the earnings report to $79.17, but our model says the move is far from over. Our 24/7 Wall St. price target for Uber ... headline: Uber Turns Drivers Into Data Source For Autonomy And Valuation Upside
summary: Uber Technologies (NYSE:UBER) is launching a pilot program to equip selected drivers' cars with sensors to collect real-world data for autonomous vehicle development. The initiative will turn parts of Uber's existing ride-hailing and delivery fleet into a distributed data collection network for mapping, traffic patterns, and environmental sensing. Uber intends to use this data internally and potentially supply it to third parties in the autonomous driving ecosystem as a separate commercial...

headline: Uber CFO to Participate in Fireside Chat Hosted by Bernstein
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, May 12, 2026--Uber Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: UBER) today announced that Balaji Krishnamurthy, CFO, will participate in a fireside chat at the Bernstein Strategic Decisions Conference on Thursday, May 28th. Mr. Krishnamurthy is scheduled to appear at 10:30am PT (1:30pm ET).
